\tzpentry{ID3886}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3886 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} F^{\mu\nu}_{\text{rot}} = \Lambda^{\mu}_{\;\;\alpha}({\omega}) \Lambda^{\nu}_{\;\;\beta}({\omega}) F^{\alpha\beta}_{\text{lab}} + \partial^{[\mu}\Lambda^{\nu]}_{\;\;\alpha} A^{\alpha} \end{equation}
